name: Whispering Pine Pass
description: A narrow, winding trail cuts through dense pine forest, hemmed in by towering evergreens and moss-covered boulders. The air is thick with the scent of pine resin and damp earth. In the distance, you hear the faint rumble of a mountain stream and the occasional cry of a hawk.

setting_data.atmosphere: The untamed wilderness exudes an air of both beauty and danger, with the constant feeling of being watched by unseen eyes.

npcs.name: Groknak the Tracker
npcs.description: A grizzled half-orc with weathered green skin and a network of scars across his face. He wears worn leather armor and carries a longbow slung across his back.
npcs.backstory: Groknak was cast out from his barbarian tribe for refusing to participate in a raid on a human settlement. He now makes a living guiding travelers through these dangerous lands.

objects.label: Fallen Log
objects.description: A massive pine trunk blocks part of the path, covered in moss and mushrooms.

objects.label: Ancient Standing Stone
objects.description: A weathered stone monolith covered in faded carvings stands just off the path.

objects.label: Gurgling Stream
objects.description: A small, clear stream cuts across the path, requiring a short leap to cross.

objects.label: Rocky Outcropping
objects.description: A jagged formation of granite rocks juts out from the forest floor.

objects.label: Animal Tracks
objects.description: Various animal tracks can be seen in the soft earth near the path.
